Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Yes. You never know when an enemy might appear.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}But... I thought you couldn't scan outside of Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}To be honest, I am indeed lacking in that area...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Maybe this is the best Penthesilea can do in terms of data-gathering.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Though I must say, the power of Persona seems to be much more diverse than I once thought.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}We even have someone who can switch Personas in the midst of battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}There's something special about his ability...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}And it hasn't even been that long since his awakening.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}But in the end, it's up to him whether or not he reaches his full potential.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}What!? You actually found one?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Wait, something's not right. The reading is too big.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I've never detected an enemy of this size...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Wait... Is it like that huge one from last month!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Well then, this is gonna be fun.[n]{f 1 1}
